blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You're walking along the beach in a very specific direction.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: It's the only direction. It's a beach.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: The bedroom windows. Second floor. The one on the far left has a direct angle from the exterior drainage line.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Why are you looking at drainage lines on a beach vacation?
Twenty foot drop. Iron brackets spaced unevenly. The window was open even with the temperature dropping.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: I don't know who has it.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: With a very specific access profile.

blocks.prompt: The window. Does Julian keep thinking about it?

options.label: He files it. He doesn't know why yet.
He lets it go. It's just a window.
